data.name: Temple of Mars
data.description: Watchtower of the Order. Sister Monument to the Command Center. A read-only Progressive Web App that aggregates live state from every active province — SproutLab, SEP Dashboard, SEP Invoicing, Codex, Command Center — and renders campaign dashboards, province telemetry, and lore. First non-HTML PWA in the Order (deliberate departure from the single-file province pattern, per Sovereign decree 2026-04-23).
data.current_phase: v0.1 live. War Time 2026-04-24 is the first campaign. Ignis assumes Builder seat at Hour 0.

shelf_history.reason: Founded by Sovereign decree to serve as Watchtower sibling to the Command Center Monument. First modern-toolchain PWA in the Order. Builder: Ignis (first project; Minister seat vacated).

design_principles.notes: Inherits Codex design system verbatim — Playfair Display (display) + Work Sans (body), .dark on :root, --fs-base 3-tier slider (12/14/17px), stroke-1.5 SVG icon system (port of cx(name)), mars red/cyan + province color tokens. Stack B documented in CHARTER.md: SvelteKit 2 + adapter-static + Tailwind v4 + @vite-pwa/sveltekit + TypeScript strict + Biome + Vitest.
